# gitlab-update-mr


Push branch commits and update the existing PR body safely (prefer REST API)



## Triggers

- Use the skill `gitlab-update-mr`

- Refresh the existing merge request description

- Update the MR body to match the latest diff




## What I do

- Validate the branch locally.

- Push the current branch, handling unset upstreams.

- Detect which MR corresponds to the current branch.

- Regenerate the PR body from `.gitlab/merge_request_templates/MERGE_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` using `main...HEAD`.

- Update the PR body via `glab mr update` or the `glab api` fallback.




## Usage examples

- When you already have a MR open and need to refresh its description for the latest changes.

- Ask the agent to update the MR body right before merging.
